'''Barada M'Beg''' was the legendary [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] leader who signed the [[Treaty of Vontor]] for [[Klatooine/Legends|Klatooine]] and its people, some time around [[25,100 BBY]]. Though the Klatooinians took part in the wars against [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] and eventually played a key role in defeating him, the [[Species/Legends|species]] remained forever in the service of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. Many [[Gender/Legends|male]] Klatooinians continued to be named either [[Barada (name)|Barada]] or M'Beg in honor of their ancient leader.<ref name="NEGA">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>
